BoE's Mann: Consumer behavior is a linchpin for growth prospects
Upland Software (Nasdaq: UPLD) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7, 2024, followed by conference call at 4:00 pm CT.
news.summary: Upland Software, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPLD) based in Austin, Texas, declared that it will unveil its financial results for Q3 2024 post-market closure on Thursday, November 7, 2024. The subsequent conference call and webcast are scheduled for 4:00 p.m. CT / 5:00 p.m. ET. Interested individuals can join the call via a webcast on investor.uplandsoftware.com or by dialing toll-free numbers 1 (800) 715-9871 (for North American participants) or 1 (646) 307-1963.

news.headline: American Financial Resources, LLC chooses Polly for pricing strategies, borrower experience. Polly's technology aims to boost revenue, lower costs of origination. (Word count: 19, Characters: 106)
news.summary: In San Francisco, Polly, a top provider of advanced mortgage capital markets technology, recently announced American Financial Resources, LLC (AFR) as their newest client for their cloud-based technology and high-speed product and pricing engine (PPE). AFR chose Polly to aid in their aggressive growth goals, boost profits per loan, lower origination costs, all while prioritizing the borrower's journey. Company leaders highlight Polly's precise solutions as crucial in their decision-making process.

news.headline: Moat Metrics launches Innovation Alpha™, an AI-powered platform for investment decision-making, unveiling innovation behaviors.
news.summary: Moat Metrics, a renowned player in AI-driven innovation analytics, has unveiled a cutting-edge platform named Innovation Alpha™ in New York. This revolutionary tool aims to transform investment strategies by utilizing advanced artificial intelligence to uncover a company's proven innovative activities in product development and market engagement. Through Innovation Alpha™, investors, corporate executives, and stakeholders can access unparalleled insights into a company's authentic innovative capabilities. This initiative marks a pivotal moment in investment decision-making and promises to provide invaluable information to users.

news.headline: Zero Carbon Academy Awards in London honored innovators in clean technology revolution in 2024.
news.summary: A press release from Zero Carbon Academy in London announces the recipients of the 2024 Cleantech Awards, honoring the top innovators contributing to the clean technology movement.

news.headline: Savvy Advisors expands with addition of Wealth Managers Craig Austad and Eric Passin to affiliate RIA, Savvy Wealth.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that Craig Austad and Eric S. Passin have joined Savvy Wealth's RIA affiliate, Savvy Advisors, as wealth managers. This new addition showcases the company's commitment to expanding its team with experienced professionals. Austad and Passin bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise to their roles, further enhancing the services provided by Savvy Advisors. This move is expected to bolster the company's capabilities to cater to a wider range of clients and increase its overall assets under management.

news.headline: Kingston Technology launching CUDIMM modules for Intel 800-Series Chipset in California.
news.summary: In Fountain Valley, California, Kingston Technology is set to launch CUDIMM modules specially designed for the Intel 800-Series Chipset. This move aims to cater to the growing demand for high-performance memory solutions in the market. The modules are expected to provide increased speed and efficiency for users, enhancing their computing experience. This strategic release aligns with Kingston's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Inovedis Inc. treats first U.S. patients with SINEFIX™ Rotator Cuff Repair System, a new milestone for the company.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Inovedis Inc., an innovative medical technology startup, achieved a significant accomplishment in soft tissue repair by treating the first U.S. patients with their groundbreaking SINEFIX™ Rotator Cuff Repair System. This milestone signifies a major advancement in the field of medical technology and marks the beginning of a new era in soft tissue repair.

news.headline: Wealth.com partners with Independent Advisor Alliance to provide 225 advisors across 27 states with advanced estate planning resources.
news.summary: Wealth.com, a top estate planning platform, has partnered with Independent Advisor Alliance (IAA), a prominent hybrid firm, to offer advanced digital estate planning resources to IAA's 225 advisors in 27 states. This partnership aims to empower financial advisors to enhance their practice as independent business owners. Through this collaboration, advisors will have access to cutting-edge tools to improve their services and grow their businesses.

news.headline: BoE's Mann: The UK economy won't grow by much more than 1%.
BoE's Mann: UK economic prospects remain pretty modest.
Central Bark® achieved significant growth and higher revenues in Q3 2024, marking its 20th year in business. MILWAUKEE, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Milwaukee, October 24, 2024 - Central Bark®, a leading whole dog care franchise and industry trailblazer, has marked its 20th year in business with a surge in revenues and consistent expansion. The company has navigated a period of remarkable growth and transformation, further solidifying its position as an industry leader. The steady progress has resulted in significant financial gains, with revenue figures soaring and reaching milestone numbers. This success has been attributed to the brand's innovative approach and unwavering commitment to excellence in pet care services.

news.headline: Tripadvisor to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 6, 2024; available on ir.tripadvisor.com after market close.
news.summary: Tripadvisor, Inc., headquartered in Needham, Massachusetts, revealed in a press release today that they will be releasing their financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Wednesday, November 6. The report will be available on the company's investor relations website at ir.tripadvisor.com. Tripadvisor is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TRIP. Investors and stakeholders can access the information after the market closes on that day.

news.headline: Safe and Green Development Corporation (Nasdaq: SGD) regains compliance with Nasdaq listing standards on Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: In Miami on October 24, 2024, Safe and Green Development Corporation (Nasdaq: SGD) disclosed receiving official communication from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC, indicating the Company has regained compliance with Nasdaq's minimum requirements. The Company, operating under the ticker symbol SGD, expressed satisfaction with this development.

news.headline: EpiVax and CUBRC awarded $2M FDA contract to develop control peptides for generic peptide drugs.
news.summary: EpiVax, Inc. and CUBRC, Inc. have revealed a recent development as they have secured a notable contract from the Office of Generic Drugs (OGD) under the FDA. The awarded contract, valued at $2 million, spans a two-year period and is identified under contract number #75F40124C00094. The purpose of this agreement is centered around the joint efforts of EpiVax and CUBRC in a significant project to enhance...

news.headline: Oka unveils global lineslip with Lloyd's Syndicates Apollo & Hiscox for Article 6 insurance solution. World's first policy for voluntary carbon credits traded into compliance.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Park City, Utah and London on October 24, 2024, Oka, known as The Carbon Insurance Company™, introduced a lineslip for their innovative Article 6 insurance product, Corresponding Adjustment Protect™. This marks the launch of the initial policy designed for voluntary carbon credits exchanged to meet regulatory requirements. This development represents a significant milestone in the industry as Oka continues to lead the way in offering solutions for carbon credit insurance.

news.headline: Benzinga announces finalists for 2024 Global Fintech Awards; 10th annual event to be held in NYC.
news.summary: In New York on October 24, 2024, Benzinga, a top financial media platform catering to next-generation investors, revealed the nominees for its 10th Benzinga Global Fintech Awards. The event will be held at the prestigious Convene Brookfield Place in New York City.

news.headline: Thomas Dorsey acquires stake in Pelican Air Services, boosting international expansion plans. Bordeaux, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Pelican Air Services' international expansion reaches a significant milestone in Bordeaux, France, with the announcement on Oct. 24, 2024. The company, renowned for its expertise in wine logistics, celebrates the appointment of Thomas Dorsey, the founder of Dorsey, Wright & Associates, as a crucial step in their growth strategy.

news.headline: Medicaid expansion linked to improved cancer care: Study shows longer survival, reduced treatment delays for aggressive breast cancer.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by the American Cancer Society revealed that Medicaid expansion has been linked to improved outcomes for cancer patients. The research, published in the JNCCN—Journal of the National Comprehensive Cancer Network, showed that states that expanded Medicaid experienced longer survival rates and decreased delays in treatment. This study provides significant insights, suggesting that Medicaid expansion plays a crucial role in enhancing the quality of care for cancer patients. The findings emphasize the importance of policy decisions in healthcare, with key statistics supporting the benefits of Medicaid expansion. The study's outcomes were based on data analysis from a wide range of states, showcasing the tangible impact of such healthcare initiatives.

news.headline: Tractor Supply Q3 earnings meet estimates, net sales of $3.47 billion fall short, with a 0.2% comp store sales decline.
news.summary: Tractor Supply Company's (NASDAQ:TSCO) stock is down in premarket trading following the release of their third-quarter financial results. The company reported earnings per share of $2.24, meeting analyst expectations. Despite this, third-quarter net sales were $3.47 billion, a 1.6% increase from the previous year, but fell short of the anticipated $3.485 billion. The rise in sales was driven by new store openings. Comparable store sales saw a 0.2% decrease compared to the previous year, attributed to a 0.3% rise in average transaction count offset by a 0.5% decrease in average ticket. Gross profit rose by 3.2% to $1.29 billion, with gross margin increasing 56 basis points year-over-year to 37.2%. This growth in gross margin was primarily due to...

news.headline: Dispatch introduces Recruit, transforming contractor recruiting and management. Launching latest innovation. #fieldservice #contractorrecruiting
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Boston, Dispatch, a prominent company in field service management, introduced their latest product, Recruit. This innovative tool enables businesses to efficiently establish and oversee a group of skilled independent service providers. The launch signifies Dispatch's commitment to advancing industry solutions and providing companies with the tools needed to thrive in a competitive market.

news.headline: Optiv AI Security Services help organizations leverage AI securely, reduce risk, secure business value, and innovate faster.
news.summary: In Denver on October 24, 2024, it was reported that organizations are increasingly focused on adopting artificial intelligence technologies to stay competitive. They are prioritizing the implementation of AI systems while also taking measures to minimize risks and secure business value. This strategy involves setting up guardrails to mitigate potential negative impacts. The goal is to accelerate innovation while safeguarding against potential pitfalls. This approach aims to position businesses for success in an evolving technological landscape.

news.headline: SkyQuest Technology forecasts the Global Flow Chemistry Market to reach USD 3.32 Billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 7.1%. North America leads due to growing investments, with the US holding over 75% revenue share. The market is witnessing significant growth driven by demand for sustainable production processes in the chemical and pharmaceutical industries.
news.summary: SkyQuest projects that the Global Flow Chemistry Market will reach a value of USD 3.32 Billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 7.1% from 2024-2031. The market is growing due to increased demand for sustainable and efficient production processes in the chemical and pharmaceutical industries. Flow chemistry offers benefits like improved control over reactions, safety, waste generation, and efficiency compared to batch operations. North America, led by the US with over 75% revenue share in 2023, is a key player in the market growth, with investments in R&D and expansion in the chemicals and pharmaceuticals manufacturing sector. The market is expected to grow further due to focus on process optimization, sustainability, and cost efficiency.

news.headline: Hong Kong Monetary Authority reveals strong demand with bid-to-cover ratio of 7.21 for 3-year RMB HKSAR Govt Bonds.
news.summary: The 3-year RMB HKSAR Government Bonds issued by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority received significant interest from investors, as indicated by a bid-to-cover ratio of 7.21. This high demand underscores strong investor confidence in the bonds.

news.headline: BWXT invests $500,000 to open John D. Haynes School of Welding Technology at Mount Vernon High School in Indiana.
news.summary: In Mount Vernon, Indiana, BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) has unveiled the John D. Haynes School of Welding Technology at Mount Vernon High School. This initiative, backed by BWXT, the U.S. Navy, and the BlueForge Alliance, involves a substantial investment of $500,000. The aim is to support students keen on entering the welding profession by offering educational resources. The establishment of this welding school not only enhances educational opportunities but also sets the stage for potential employment for students from Mount Vernon.

news.headline: Enovation Controls, part of Helios Technologies, named UK Best Workplace in Manufacturing.
news.summary: A manufacturing, production, and transportation company operating under Helios Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: HLIO) known as Enovation Controls has been recognized as one of the best workplaces in the UK. Located in Sarasota, Florida, this achievement signifies the company's commitment to creating a positive work environment for its employees. Enovation Controls' dedication to excellence has earned them a prestigious ranking in the industry, showcasing their position as a leading organization within the manufacturing, production, and transportation sector. Congratulations to Enovation Controls for this well-deserved accolade.

news.headline: New-vehicle sales in October 2024 expected to rise with 16.1M SAAR; Consumer spending on vehicles up 11.8% YoY.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, it is projected by J.D. Power that new-vehicle sales for October will experience a boost, with an estimated Seasonally Adjusted Annual Rate (SAAR) of 16.1 million. Additionally, consumer expenditure on vehicles has shown a notable increase of 11.8% in comparison to the previous year.

news.headline: XTM offering C$7,000,000 in convertible debentures at C$1,100 per debenture with 12% interest rate and 24-month maturity.
news.summary: Toronto-based XTM INC. has announced a non-brokered private placement offering of convertible debentures priced at C$1,100 each, aiming to raise up to C$7,000,000 in total proceeds. The debentures will mature in 24 months, with an annual interest rate of 12%. Investors have the option to convert the debentures into debenture units at a conversion price of...

news.headline: Expensify (Nasdaq: EXFY) to announce Q3 results on Nov 7, 2024 after market close, with a call at 2pm PT / 5pm ET.
news.summary: Expensify, Inc., a payments superapp traded on Nasdaq under the ticker EXFY, is set to reveal its Q3 financial performance on November 7th, 2024, post-market closure. The company's call to delve into the Q3 results is scheduled for the same day at 2pm PT / 5pm ET. Expensify aids individuals and businesses globally in streamlining money management for expenses, corporate cards, and bills. More details on accessing the call will be provided on the day of the event.

news.headline: MACOM (Nasdaq: MTSI) to disclose Q4 and FY 2024 results ending Sep 27 on Nov 7, 2024, conducting a conference call at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: Technology company MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: MTSI) based in Lowell, Mass., will reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 which ended on September 27, 2024. These results will be presented before the market opens on Thursday, November 7, 2024. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time and will be led by Mr. Stephen G. Daly, President and CEO, along with Mr. John F. Kober, Senior VP.

news.headline: Visa partners with USAID to enhance global digital government access and systems. Collaboration aims for inclusivity.
news.summary: Visa has partnered with USAID to enhance accessibility of open, secure, and inclusive digital government systems globally.

news.headline: Marchex (NASDAQ: MCHX) to release Q3 2024 results on October 31, 2024, at 4:20 p.m. ET. AI-driven company focusing on revenue acceleration.
news.summary: Seattle-based company Marchex (NASDAQ: MCHX) is utilizing AI and conversational intelligence to boost operational effectiveness and revenue growth. The company is scheduled to report its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on October 31, 2024, at 4:20 p.m. ET. The press release will be available on Marchex's corporate website's Press Center section. Post-release, there will be a management discussion.

news.headline: Securonix partners with AVANT to deliver AI-reinforced CyberOps to global enterprises, expanding cybersecurity solutions.
news.summary: Securonix, Inc., a prominent in Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) technology, has joined forces with AVANT, a renowned Technology Services Distributor, to provide cutting-edge cybersecurity solutions. As a five-time Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader, Securonix's expertise will now be accessible to AVANT's vast network. This collaboration aims to empower organizations in combating the ever-changing cyber threats by leveraging advanced SIEM and AI-Reinforced technologies.

news.headline: Nintendo Switch Online introduces Banjo-Tooie for Nintendo 64; continues bear-bird duo adventures. #nintendoswitch
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, a recent Nintendo Download released for Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack features the launch of Banjo-Tooie for Nintendo 64 – Nintendo Switch Online library. In this game, Banjo and Kazooie face the revived evil witch Gruntilda and must work together to stop her. Filled with action, magical minigames, and challenging puzzles, this adventure follows the success of its predecessor. The expansion pack offers an array of new content to enhance the gaming experience.

news.headline: Sportradar wins two awards at 2024 American Gambling Awards: Betting Product of the Year for 4Sight technology and Data Service Provider of the Year.Produced by Gambling.com Group Limited.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Sportradar has been honored with two awards at the 2024 American Gambling Awards. The company was recognized for its 4Sight technology, winning the Betting Product of the Year award, and also received the Data Service Provider of the Year award. These accolades showcase Sportradar's significant impact on the sports betting industry. The American Gambling Awards are organized by Gambling.com Group Limited, a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol GAMB. This event celebrates leading companies and entities within the gambling sector.

news.headline: Sandbox VR partners with LOL Entertainment to open 4 new locations in East Coast cities - Baltimore, Boston, Philadelphia, and Washington DC.
news.summary: A partnership has been announced between Sandbox VR, a leading destination for high-quality location-based virtual reality experiences, and LOL Entertainment, a company known for creating immersive location-based entertainment. This collaboration will result in the establishment of four new Sandbox VR locations in key East Coast cities: Baltimore, Boston, Philadelphia, and Washington DC. This expansion is part of LOL Entertainment's strategy to invest in diverse location-based entertainment ventures, with Sandbox VR joining their portfolio of offerings.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer tops all 6 quadrants in Chartis ALM Solutions Report, showing leadership in finance solutions.
news.summary: A global leader in professional information, software solutions, and services, Wolters Kluwer's Finance, Risk, and Regulatory Reporting (FRR) business has achieved top position in all six categories within the Chartis ALM Solutions 2024 Market Quadrants report. Chartis, providing independent research for banks, tech vendors, investment managers, and insurers, recognizes Wolters Kluwer's dominance in Asset Liability Management (ALM) solutions. This achievement reflects the company's dedication to excellence in the industry and its commitment to providing innovative and reliable products and services.

news.headline: ScienceLogic® recognized as 2024 Inc. Power Partner for second year in a row, among 359 companies, supporting entrepreneurs.
news.summary: RESTON, Virginia--ScienceLogic®, a prominent player in automated IT operations and observability, revealed today its inclusion in Inc.’s third annual Power Partner Award list. This reputable roster celebrates leading B2B entities nationwide with a demonstrated history of aiding entrepreneurs and fostering startup development. ScienceLogic secures a position on the list for the second consecutive year, alongside 359 firms spanning essential industry sectors such as health and wellness, and financial services.

news.headline: Michelob Ultra and Complex host celebrity golf event in Las Vegas, showcasing culture and music.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, a cultural golf renaissance is underway as Complex teams up with Michelob ULTRA to host an event where the biggest names in entertainment will gather. This collaboration, announced on October 24, 2024, signifies Complex's entry into the golf scene, known for its global culture and music lifestyle curation. This event is set to draw significant attention and participation from enthusiasts and industry leaders alike.

news.headline: Humana and Longevity Health expand access to Medicare Advantage Institutional Special Needs Plan in multi-state agreement.
news.summary: A new agreement between Humana and Longevity Health in multiple states will boost access to Humana Together in Health, a Medicare Advantage Institutional Special Needs Plan. The collaboration is set to benefit a significant number of individuals, providing them with improved healthcare access and specialized services.

news.headline: Vecna Robotics unveils CaseFlow™, streamlining case picking operations by automating 90% of warehouse travel and doubling worker throughput.
news.summary: In Waltham, MA, Vecna Robotics unveiled CaseFlowTM, a comprehensive solution for case picking operations. This innovative system incorporates pallet-handling robots for 90% of warehouse transportation, enhancing efficiency significantly. By implementing dynamic, directed zone picking, the solution boosts site performance by over 100%, simultaneously enhancing worker satisfaction and safety. Reports from Logistics Management and Warehouse & Distribution Science validate the efficacy of this approach.

news.headline: RGP's survey examines impact of interest rates on U.S. corporate investment decisions, shares macroeconomic insights.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, RGP published a fresh study on the influence of macroeconomic variables on workforce strategy choices among American firms.

news.headline: Transamerica partners with Fringe Benefit Group to enhance retirement plan solutions via The Contractors Plan, serving 1,500 employers with a $2 billion program.
news.summary: Today, in Baltimore, Transamerica revealed an extended partnership with Fringe Benefit Group (FBG) and The Contractors Plan, a prevailing wage retirement plan program worth $2 billion. This program manages retirement benefits for close to 1,500 employers, further solidifying the collaboration between the companies.

news.headline: Honda Aircraft Company receives Tier-6 Sustainable Flight Department Accreditation by NBAA, highest honor in flight category.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on October 24, 2024, Honda Aircraft Company received Tier-6 Sustainable Flight Department Accreditation from the National Business Aviation Association (NBAA) in the Flight category. This accreditation signifies the highest level of recognition, demonstrating Honda Aircraft Company's commitment to sustainability in aviation operations.

news.headline: NTT DATA to train 200,000 employees globally in Generative AI technology, aiming to develop 30,000 experts.
news.summary: In Tokyo today, NTT DATA revealed their Generative AI (GenAI) Talent Development Framework, aiming to enhance existing employee training programs. This global framework sets various levels of GenAI proficiency as a standard to swiftly build a proficient workforce. The structure is intended to assist in efficiently upskilling employees for clients to maximize GenAI benefits. This initiative emphasizes the company's commitment to nurturing skilled professionals.

news.headline: 28 universities implement Workday Student in 2024 for student success and career support with Illuminate AI.
news.summary: On October 24th, Iowa State University, Wake Forest University, and several other educational institutions implemented Workday Student to enhance student success and career opportunities. By utilizing Illuminate, the latest Workday AI technology, administrators can streamline their processes for improved productivity. This move signifies a step towards supporting students in achieving their academic and professional goals.

news.headline: DoiT earns AWS Cloud Operations Competency for Cloud Financial Management, offering comprehensive solutions in five key areas.
news.summary: DoiT, a leading global multicloud expert, based in Santa Clara, California, has recently attained the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Cloud Operations Competency. This achievement signifies that DoiT is among the select AWS Partners recognized for providing top-tier solutions in Cloud Operations. The competency covers all aspects including Cloud Financial Management and Cloud Gov, showcasing DoiT's expertise across the five key solution areas. This recognition highlights DoiT's commitment to delivering exceptional services to cloud-focused entities.

news.headline: Moors & Cabot launches new service model M&C Complete in Boston, enhancing client experiences. Established in 1890.
news.summary: A financial advisory firm in Boston, Moors & Cabot, established in 1890, is undergoing advancements to enhance services for its financial professionals and clients. The firm, rooted in the city for over a century, focuses on improving experiences.

news.headline: Sally Beauty introduces ion Luxe 8-In-1 Airstyler Pro, an all-in-one tool for hairstyling. Located in Denton, Texas.
news.summary: In Denton, Texas, on October 24, 2024, Sally Beauty introduced the ion Luxe 8-In-1 Airstyler Pro, a revolutionary all-in-one hairstyling tool. This new offering from ion aims to transform hairstyling for everyone. Sally Beauty, a top destination for professional hair color and care products, showcased this innovative tool.
